item.title: Centre Lathe Service and Maintenance
item.description: A workshop maintenance guide covering the servicing of a centre lathe. The video focuses on inspection, cleaning, lubrication, and adjustments to keep the machine operating accurately. What maintenance task do you think is most important?

media:content.media:title: Centre Lathe Service and Maintenance
media:content.media:description: A workshop maintenance guide covering the servicing of a centre lathe. The video focuses on inspection, cleaning, lubrication, and adjustments to keep the machine operating accurately. What maintenance task do you think is most important?

item.title: The Puzzle Is Still Not Solved
item.description: An engineering project continues as the team works through an unresolved mechanical problem. The video explores troubleshooting, inspection, and the search for the root cause. What do you think is the key to solving complex mechanical issues?

media:content.media:title: The Puzzle Is Still Not Solved
media:content.media:description: An engineering project continues as the team works through an unresolved mechanical problem. The video explores troubleshooting, inspection, and the search for the root cause. What do you think is the key to solving complex mechanical issues?

item.title: Extending a Cylinder with Precision
item.description: A machining project modifies a hydraulic cylinder to increase its length for a specific application. The video highlights precision engineering and fabrication techniques. What custom workshop project would you like to see?

media:content.media:title: Extending a Cylinder with Precision
media:content.media:description: A machining project modifies a hydraulic cylinder to increase its length for a specific application. The video highlights precision engineering and fabrication techniques. What custom workshop project would you like to see?

item.title: Saving a Cylinder Through Precision Repair
item.description: A precision repair restores a worn hydraulic cylinder instead of replacing it. The video demonstrates machining techniques that help extend the component's service life. What repair would you choose over replacement?

media:content.media:title: Saving a Cylinder Through Precision Repair
media:content.media:description: A precision repair restores a worn hydraulic cylinder instead of replacing it. The video demonstrates machining techniques that help extend the component's service life. What repair would you choose over replacement?

item.title: Repairing a Cracked D10 Equalizer Bar
item.description: A heavy equipment repair project restores a cracked equalizer bar from a CAT D10 dozer. The video follows the machining, welding, and repair process to return the component to service. What repair technique stands out most to you?

media:content.media:title: Repairing a Cracked D10 Equalizer Bar
media:content.media:description: A heavy equipment repair project restores a cracked equalizer bar from a CAT D10 dozer. The video follows the machining, welding, and repair process to return the component to service. What repair technique stands out most to you?

item.title: Progress on a Heavy-Duty Parts Washer
item.description: An update on the construction of a heavy-duty parts washer, showcasing fabrication progress, assembly work, and workshop engineering. What feature would you add to a parts washer?

media:content.media:title: Progress on a Heavy-Duty Parts Washer
media:content.media:description: An update on the construction of a heavy-duty parts washer, showcasing fabrication progress, assembly work, and workshop engineering. What feature would you add to a parts washer?

item.title: Repairing a D10 Dozer’s Broken Eye
item.description: A D10 dozer comes in with a broken eye and a serious crack, setting up a precision repair challenge. Watch the machining and fabrication process as the damage is restored with careful engineering.

media:content.media:title: Repairing a D10 Dozer’s Broken Eye
media:content.media:description: A D10 dozer comes in with a broken eye and a serious crack, setting up a precision repair challenge. Watch the machining and fabrication process as the damage is restored with careful engineering.

item.title: CAT Engine Crank Pulley Repair
item.description: A precision machining project focused on repairing a CAT engine crank pulley. The video covers inspection, machining techniques, and the steps taken to restore the component to working condition. What machining process do you find most interesting?

media:content.media:title: CAT Engine Crank Pulley Repair
media:content.media:description: A precision machining project focused on repairing a CAT engine crank pulley. The video covers inspection, machining techniques, and the steps taken to restore the component to working condition. What machining process do you find most interesting?

item.title: Centre Lathe Service and Maintenance
item.description: A look at the TM26120G centre lathe getting a routine service, with careful attention to workshop maintenance and machine performance. Clean, precise engineering keeps equipment running smoothly.

media:content.media:title: Centre Lathe Service and Maintenance
media:content.media:description: A look at the TM26120G centre lathe getting a routine service, with careful attention to workshop maintenance and machine performance. Clean, precise engineering keeps equipment running smoothly.

item.title: Inspecting the Damage Inside a Barrel
item.description: A close look at the inside of a damaged barrel and the engineering work needed to assess it. A satisfying example of inspection, precision, and workshop problem-solving. What would you check first?

media:content.media:title: Inspecting the Damage Inside a Barrel
media:content.media:description: A close look at the inside of a damaged barrel and the engineering work needed to assess it. A satisfying example of inspection, precision, and workshop problem-solving. What would you check first?

item.title: Making a Heavy-Duty Hex Socket
item.description: Follow the fabrication of a heavy-duty hex socket designed for demanding industrial applications. The video highlights machining, material preparation, and precision manufacturing techniques. What workshop tool would you like to see made next?

media:content.media:title: Making a Heavy-Duty Hex Socket
media:content.media:description: Follow the fabrication of a heavy-duty hex socket designed for demanding industrial applications. The video highlights machining, material preparation, and precision manufacturing techniques. What workshop tool would you like to see made next?

item.title: Making a New Cylinder Nut, Step by Step
item.description: A clear step-by-step look at making a new cylinder nut, with careful machining and precise workshop work from start to finish. What details stand out most in the process?

media:content.media:title: Making a New Cylinder Nut, Step by Step
media:content.media:description: A clear step-by-step look at making a new cylinder nut, with careful machining and precise workshop work from start to finish. What details stand out most in the process?

item.title: A Fresh Start for a Seized Nut
item.description: A seized nut gets careful workshop attention with precision tools and steady engineering know-how. A simple repair, done with the right process and a clean finish. What would you tackle first?

media:content.media:title: A Fresh Start for a Seized Nut
media:content.media:description: A seized nut gets careful workshop attention with precision tools and steady engineering know-how. A simple repair, done with the right process and a clean finish. What would you tackle first?

item.title: Heavy-Duty Parts Washer Build, Part 1
item.description: Construction begins on a custom heavy-duty parts washer designed to improve cleaning efficiency and support large-scale workshop repairs.

media:content.media:title: Heavy-Duty Parts Washer Build, Part 1
media:content.media:description: Construction begins on a custom heavy-duty parts washer designed to improve cleaning efficiency and support large-scale workshop repairs.

item.title: Precision Cuts on a Massive Part
item.description: A massive industrial component undergoes precision machining, highlighting the accuracy and skill required for oversized repair work.

media:content.media:title: Precision Cuts on a Massive Part
media:content.media:description: A massive industrial component undergoes precision machining, highlighting the accuracy and skill required for oversized repair work.

item.title: Continuing the D8 Dozer Blade Restoration
item.description: The D8 bulldozer blade restoration continues with additional machining, welding, and finishing work to prepare it for service once again.

media:content.media:title: Continuing the D8 Dozer Blade Restoration
media:content.media:description: The D8 bulldozer blade restoration continues with additional machining, welding, and finishing work to prepare it for service once again.
